items.a: Annual school fees are R15,000 for 2026. This can be paid monthly (R1,250/month), quarterly, or annually. A 5% discount applies for full annual payment before 31 January.
Monthly fees are due by the 7th of each month. Quarterly payments are due in January, April, July, and October.
We accept EFT bank transfers, debit orders, cash payments at the school office, and Capitec/FNB/Standard Bank deposits. The school banking details are: Bank: FNB, Account: 62xxxxxxxx, Branch: 250655
Yes. Fee exemptions are available for qualifying families. NSFAS bursary applications for Grade 12 learners open in August each year. Please contact the school office for application forms.
Term 1: 14 January – 21 March 2026. Term 2: 1 April – 20 June 2026. Term 3: 14 July – 19 September 2026. Term 4: 29 September – 10 December 2026.
Autumn break: 22 March – 31 March. Winter break: 21 June – 13 July. Spring break: 20 September – 28 September. Summer break: 11 December – 13 January 2027.
School starts at 07:30 and ends at 14:30. After-school activities run until 16:00. The school gate opens at 06:45.

items.q: How do I enroll my child?
items.a: Step 1: Collect an application form from the school office or download from our website. Step 2: Submit the form with certified copies of the child's birth certificate, previous school reports, immunization card, and proof of residence. Step 3: Pay the R200 non-refundable application fee. Step 4: Attend the interview (if applicable). Applications for the following year open on 1 May.

items.q: What documents are needed for enrollment?
items.a: Required: Birth certificate (certified copy), Previous school report card, Transfer card from previous school, Immunization/clinic card, Proof of residence (utility bill or lease), Parent/guardian ID document (certified copy), 2 passport-size photos.
Please contact the admissions office at 015-xxx-xxxx or email admissions@gudanischool.co.za for current availability.

Boys: Grey trousers, white shirt, school tie, navy blazer, black shoes. Girls: Grey skirt (below the knee), white blouse, school tie, navy blazer, black shoes. Sports uniform: House colour T-shirt, navy shorts, takkies.

items.q: Where can I buy the uniform?
items.a: School uniforms are available at: 1) The school tuck shop (Mondays and Wednesdays 07:00-08:00), 2) Uniform City in the town center, 3) PEP and Ackermans for basic items (white shirts, grey trousers/skirts).
Yes, the school operates 3 bus routes covering the main surrounding areas. The bus fee is R500/month. Contact the office for route maps and pickup times.
Drop-off zone is at the main gate (Gate A) between 06:45 and 07:25. No parking in the drop-off zone. Afternoon collection is from Gate B between 14:30 and 15:00.

items.q: How do I contact the school?
items.a: Phone: 015-xxx-xxxx, Email: info@gudanischool.co.za, Physical address: 123 Education Street, Thohoyandou, Limpopo, 0950. Office hours: Monday–Friday, 07:00–16:00.
The principal is Mr. T. Mudau. You can request an appointment through the school secretary.
